---
title: "Tut 2 Collab - practice"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}

#| label: fig-penguins-scatter
#| fig-cap: "Body mass vs. Flipper length for three penguin species."
#| warning: false
library(ggplot2)
library(palmerpenguins)

ggplot(penguins, aes(x = flipper_length_mm, y = body_mass_g, color = species)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()

```

Testing the cross referencing @fig-penguins-scatter, is my first cross reference
